FreePats

Keep your ears open

Acoustic Drum Kit

MuldjordKit

Photo courtesy of Lars Muldjord

Version 2020-10-18

Recorded by Lars Muldjord in 2010. The kit consist of 2 kickdrums, 3 hanging toms, 1 floor tom, 1 snare, 1 hihat, 2 crash cymbals, 2 ride cymbals, 1 china cymbal.

This version of MuldjordKit has been assembled by roberto@zenvoid.org for the FreePats project. It's a simplified version compared to the original MuldjordKit for DrumGizmo. This is a stereo kit (2 channels) whereas the original provides 16 channels that can be selectively mixed to create many different sound renderings.

Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 license.
